rules.name: OpenAI Infrastructure: Critical DNS Resolution
rules.description: Allow DNS resolution for critical OpenAI domains and infrastructure services.
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn == "openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "chat.openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "api.openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "platform.openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "auth0.openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "setup.auth.openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "tcr9i.chat.openai.com" or dns.fqdn == "chatgpt.com" or dns.fqdn == "files.oaiusercontent.com" or dns.fqdn == "js.stripe.com" or dns.fqdn == "challenges.cloudflare.com" or dns.fqdn == "statsigapi.net" or dns.fqdn == "events.statsigapi.net" or dns.fqdn == "featuregates.org" or dns.fqdn == "prodregistryv2.org" or dns.fqdn == "featureassets.org" or dns.fqdn == "intercomcdn.com" or dns.fqdn == "js.intercomcdn.com" or dns.fqdn == "setup.workos.com" or dns.fqdn == "forwarder.workos.com" or dns.fqdn == "workos.imgix.net" or dns.fqdn == "cdn.workos.com" or dns.fqdn == "images.workoscdn.com" or dns.fqdn == "events.launchdarkly.com" or dns.fqdn == "clientstream.launchdarkly.com" or dns.fqdn == "app.launchdarkly.com" or dns.fqdn == "rum.browser-intake-datadoghq.com" or dns.fqdn == "o33249.ingest.sentry.io" or dns.fqdn == "o207216.ingest.sentry.io" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.auth\\.openai.com" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.chatgpt\\.com" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.oaiusercontent\\.com" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.oaistatic\\.com" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.statsig\\.com" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.featuregates\\.org" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.intercomcdn\\.com" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.intercom\\.io" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\\.ct\\.sendgrid.net"

rules.name: OpenAI Infrastructure: HTTPS Access
rules.description: Allow HTTPS access to OpenAI infrastructure domains and services.
rules.traffic: http.request.host == "openai.com" or http.request.host == "chat.openai.com" or http.request.host == "api.openai.com" or http.request.host == "platform.openai.com" or http.request.host == "auth0.openai.com" or http.request.host == "setup.auth.openai.com" or http.request.host == "tcr9i.chat.openai.com" or http.request.host == "chatgpt.com" or http.request.host == "files.oaiusercontent.com" or http.request.host == "js.stripe.com" or http.request.host == "challenges.cloudflare.com" or http.request.host == "statsigapi.net" or http.request.host == "events.statsigapi.net" or http.request.host == "featuregates.org" or http.request.host == "prodregistryv2.org" or http.request.host == "featureassets.org" or http.request.host == "intercomcdn.com" or http.request.host == "js.intercomcdn.com" or http.request.host == "setup.workos.com" or http.request.host == "forwarder.workos.com" or http.request.host == "workos.imgix.net" or http.request.host == "cdn.workos.com" or http.request.host == "images.workoscdn.com" or http.request.host == "events.launchdarkly.com" or http.request.host == "clientstream.launchdarkly.com" or http.request.host == "app.launchdarkly.com" or http.request.host == "rum.browser-intake-datadoghq.com" or http.request.host == "o33249.ingest.sentry.io" or http.request.host == "o207216.ingest.sentry.io" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.auth\\.openai.com" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.chatgpt\\.com" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.oaiusercontent\\.com" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.oaistatic\\.com" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.statsig\\.com" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.featuregates\\.org" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.intercomcdn\\.com" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.intercom\\.io" or http.request.host matches ".*\\.ct\\.sendgrid.net"

rules.name: OpenAI Infrastructure: Extended TLS Bypass
rules.description: Extended TLS bypass for additional OpenAI infrastructure domains that may use certificate validation.
rules.traffic: http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.auth\.openai\.com" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.oaiusercontent\.com" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.oaistatic\.com" or http.conn.hostname == "js.stripe.com" or http.conn.hostname == "setup.workos.com" or http.conn.hostname == "forwarder.workos.com" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.statsig\.com" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.featuregates\.org" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.intercom\.io"

rules.description:
Allow Microsoft login and authentication

rules.name: AI Services: ChatGPT Certificate Pinning Fix
rules.description: High-priority TLS bypass specifically for ChatGPT certificate pinning issues.
rules.traffic: http.conn.hostname == "chat.openai.com" or http.conn.hostname == "api.openai.com" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.openai\.com" or http.conn.hostname matches ".*\.chatgpt\.com"

rules.name: Certificate: Banking/Critical Sites TLS Bypass
rules.description: Bypass TLS inspection for critical domains to preserve original certificates and OCSP/CRL validation, preventing net::ERR_CERT_NO_REVOCATION_MECHANISM errors.

rules.name: Social: Meta Platforms (Facebook, Instagram)
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.facebook\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.instagram\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.fbcdn\.net$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.cdninstagram\.com$"

rules.name: Social: Twitter/X
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.twitter\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.x\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.twimg\.com$"

rules.name: Streaming: Netflix and Amazon Prime
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.netflix\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.nflxext\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.nflxvideo\.net$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.primevideo\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.amazonvideo\.com$"

rules.name: Network: Allow Reverse DNS Lookups (.arpa)
rules.description: Allow reverse DNS lookups for .arpa domains which are essential for network diagnostics and proper network function

rules.name: Streaming: YouTube and Google Media
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.youtube\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.googlevideo\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.ytimg\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.ggpht\.com$"

rules.name: Network: Allow mDNS/Bonjour (.local)
rules.description: Allow mDNS/Bonjour service discovery for .local domains used by Apple devices and network printers

rules.name: Network: Allow Service Discovery (_services)
rules.description: Allow service discovery queries that start with underscore (_) for network device discovery [FIXED: Updated to specific service discovery patterns]
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches "_.*\.local" or dns.fqdn matches "_.*\.lan" or dns.fqdn matches "_.*\._tcp" or dns.fqdn matches "_.*\._udp"

rules.name: Finance: Banking and Payment Services
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.paypal\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.stripe\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.square\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.visa\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.mastercard\.com$"

rules.name: Security: DNS and Monitoring Services
rules.traffic: dns.fqdn matches ".*\.1\.1\.1\.1$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.quad9\.net$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.opendns\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.umbrella\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.dyn\.com$" or dns.fqdn matches ".*\.bozza\.au$"

rules.name: Productivity: Documentation Tools
rules.description: Allow Notion and similar tools

rules.name: Software: API Services
rules.description: Allow legitimate software API endpoints

rules.name: Security: Block Unknown DNS Queries
rules.description: ⚠️ CRITICAL: This rule MUST always be the LAST rule (highest precedence) to function as a catch-all DNS blocker. DO NOT move this rule or DNS filtering will break. Blocks all DNS queries not explicitly allowed by other rules.
